topics_to_register.title: Web3, Blockchain & AI Fundamentals
topics_to_register.description: Comprehensive OJT course covering Web3 protocols, DAOs, Bitcoin/Ethereum, tokenomics, NFTs, AI x Blockchain, AINFT, ERC-8004, and the agent economy

topics_to_register.title: Web3.0 & Protocol Understanding
topics_to_register.description: The evolution of Web1/2/3 and the concept of protocol-based economies. Understanding the paradigm shift from centralized platforms to a user-owned internet.

topics_to_register.title: DAO 101
topics_to_register.description: Definition of DAOs, their three core components (smart contracts, governance tokens, on-chain treasury), and progressive decentralization strategies.

topics_to_register.title: Bitcoin & Ethereum
topics_to_register.description: Comparing Bitcoin's P2P electronic cash principles with Ethereum's Turing-complete smart contract platform to understand the technical evolution of blockchain.

topics_to_register.title: Decentralization & Consensus
topics_to_register.description: Deep exploration of the three axes of decentralization (architectural, political, logical), the Byzantine Generals Problem, Nakamoto consensus, DID, and headless brands.

topics_to_register.title: Strong & Weak Technology / Metaverse
topics_to_register.description: Analyzing blockchain's position through Chris Dixon's strong/weak technology framework, the seven metaverse essentials, and the convergence of AI/blockchain/XR.

topics_to_register.title: Tokenology
topics_to_register.description: The economic role of tokens, ERC-20/721 standards, tokenology's four design spaces, medium-of-exchange token valuation (M*V=P*Q), and Metcalfe's Law.

topics_to_register.title: NFTs Authenticate the World
topics_to_register.description: The philosophical foundations of NFTs (Type/Token distinction), eight properties, community as the source of value, Vitalik's legitimacy theory, and reshaping the creator economy.

topics_to_register.title: Advanced NFT Concepts
topics_to_register.description: 1,000 True Fans economics, the Subscribe-to-Mint model, the skeuomorph concept, and five types of evolving NFTs (Lifeforms, Corruptions, Chaos Roads, Fini, Uniswap LP).

topics_to_register.title: AI x Blockchain
topics_to_register.description: AI's long-tail problem and crypto's solution (autonomous marketplaces), the $200B GPU economics question, and the four eras of blockchain computing.

topics_to_register.title: AINFT
topics_to_register.description: Definition of AINFT (Autonomous Intelligent NFT), dynamic metadata structure, three core properties (accountability, reproducibility, value), and AINFT Factory infrastructure.

topics_to_register.title: ERC-8004 Trustless Agents
topics_to_register.description: The trust problem in the AI agent economy, ERC-8004's three registries (Identity, Reputation, Validation), and the agent economy stack.

topics_to_register.title: OpenClaw
topics_to_register.description: The OpenClaw autonomous digital worker framework, Skills-based plugins, CoinFello Skill's delegated authority model, and the convergence of the agent economy's three pillars (AINFT + ERC-8004 + OpenClaw).
